title: Whiteflies on Florida Trees: Sticky Leaves, Sooty Mold, and When to Worry
strengths: Strong Florida whitefly, honeydew, sooty-mold, ficus, and spiraling-whitefly context.
weaknesses: Overlong; visible editorial note; raw source URLs; generic CTA; no direct service links; repeated urgency/removal points.
ai_notes: Formulaic Short Answer followed by exhaustive symptom, urgency, mistakes, photo, CTA, source, and FAQ blocks.
